nodes.summary: Raises CoverageAssuranceError when any blocking row exists — the gate's teeth before audio spend.

nodes.name: AnchorResolution
nodes.summary: Resolved deck/narration anchor for a source point with resolution provenance.

nodes.name: CoverageReceiptRow
nodes.summary: Per-point receipt row enforcing round-trip status/vouch/verdict enums and the render-gate vouch fuse.

nodes.name: CoverageReceipt
nodes.summary: Receipt aggregate with grain stamp, missing-must-cover projection, vacuity checks, and canonical SHA-256 hashing.

nodes.name: _derive_row
nodes.summary: Derives one Axis-A coverage row for a source point from its resolved anchors and planned surfaces.

nodes.name: _derive_figure_facet_row
nodes.summary: Derives the figure-token facet row checking that source figures survive onto deck and narration surfaces.

nodes.name: _derive_containment
nodes.summary: Applies the Vera-R7 containment audit to produce Axis-B verbatim/altered/risky verdicts with vouch levels.

nodes.name: derive_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: Top-level derivation joining coverage annotations with anchors into a complete CoverageReceipt.

nodes.name: coverage_plan_view
nodes.summary: Projects the receipt into a planning-facing coverage view grouped by slide.

nodes.name: g0_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Frozen G0-enrichment artifact models (Story G0-S2): typed source manifest, provisional learning objectives, enumeration provenance, anti-anchoring sidecars (independent parse, operator merge, dissent ledger), citation resolutions, and the operator-confirmable G0EnrichmentResult.
nodes.languageNotes: Internal audit sidecars use SkipJsonSchema + Field(exclude=True) so they never appear in serialized output or the published JSON Schema.

nodes.name: irene_refinement.py
nodes.summary: Irene refinement artifacts and the signed LO-delta contract (G0-S3): in-place provisional-to-refined LO refinement with Bloom levels, advisory SourceAdequacy alerts, a no-silent-drops delta ledger, completeness asserts, and operator-verdict ratification.

nodes.name: learning_objective.py
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the provenance-anchored, lifecycle-aware LearningObjective entity (G0-S1), with SourceRef provenance, advisory SourceAdequacy, per-status invariants, and the advance_lo transition guard.

nodes.name: learning_objective_adapters.py
nodes.summary: Pure adapter functions bridging the canonical LearningObjective entity to the three legacy LO representations (Irene statement strings, workbook briefs, workbook-section bindings) during the additive S1 migration.

nodes.name: pedagogy_annotation.py
nodes.summary: Additive, never-gating P3 pedagogy overlay: one frozen PedagogyAnnotation per annotatable component with Bloom level, pedagogical role, deterministic teaches_after ordering, teachable verdict from front-matter, plus offline and live gpt-5 passes and referential invariants.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately never imports g0_enrichment (which imports this module); wiring-time invariants duck-type the result to avoid the cycle.

nodes.name: planning_context.py
nodes.summary: Loads optional planning context (purpose/audience/LOs/assessment) from planning-ratification.json and ratified-los.json under a run dir, and assesses ratified-LO coverage against the corpus with fail-loud asserts.

nodes.name: planning_ratification.py
nodes.summary: Records the operator's planning ratification (purpose, audience, plan choices, gap-fill tradeoffs) and emits the canonical S8 RatifiedLessonPlanCollateralIntent onto the existing selection edge, with overclaim rejection and selection deltas.

nodes.name: source_assessment.py
nodes.summary: Assesses available source material for planning ratification from either a course input bundle or a curated corpus directory, summarizing richness, source kinds, and gaps.

nodes.name: Dissent
nodes.summary: A3 dissent-ledger entry rejecting blank positions, recording where Marcus disagrees with the operator merge.

nodes.name: ReconcileView
nodes.summary: Reconciliation view enforcing that merged output is fully accounted for against the independent parse.

nodes.name: CitationResolution
nodes.summary: Round-trip validated citation-resolution record with coherence enforcement between status and resolved target.

nodes.name: G0EnrichmentResult
nodes.summary: The frozen operator-confirmable G0 result: typed components, provisional LOs (adequacy=None), provenance, anti-anchoring sidecars, and a card-payload projection.

nodes.name: assert_run_dissent_invariant
nodes.summary: Fail-loud assert that a run's dissent ledger satisfies the A3 invariant.

nodes.name: corpus_fingerprint
nodes.summary: Computes the deterministic corpus fingerprint keying the enrichment cache for replay determinism.

nodes.name: LODeltaEntry
nodes.summary: One signed delta-ledger entry per LO with disposition-channel well-formedness enforcement and drop detection.

nodes.name: LODeltaLedger
nodes.summary: Reconcilable ledger enforcing count reconciliation and no silent drops, with operator-flag projections.

nodes.name: IreneRefinementResult
nodes.summary: Frozen refinement result enforcing that Irene never ratifies, with a card-payload projection for the G0R gate.

nodes.name: refine_one
nodes.summary: Refines a single provisional LO in place (same objective_id), populating bloom level and advisory adequacy.

nodes.name: build_refinement_result
nodes.summary: Builds the full IreneRefinementResult and signed delta ledger from confirmed provisional LOs (deterministic or live).

nodes.name: assert_completeness
nodes.summary: Asserts every refined LO carries adequacy presence and all delta channels reconcile — never judging the adequacy verdict.

nodes.name: ratify_refined_los
nodes.summary: Applies the operator verdict advancing refined LOs to ratified — the only path to ratified status.

nodes.name: SourceRef
nodes.summary: Resolvable provenance reference for a learning objective, rejecting empty locators.

nodes.name: SourceAdequacy
nodes.summary: Advisory per-LO adequacy verdict enforcing missing-evidence cardinality rules; never gates the pipeline.

nodes.name: LearningObjective
nodes.summary: Canonical LO entity with immutable objective_id validation and per-status field invariants across the provisional/refined/ratified lifecycle.

nodes.name: advance_lo
nodes.summary: Transition guard enforcing legal actor-plus-status transitions (only an operator verdict reaches ratified), raising IllegalTransition otherwise.

nodes.name: from_irene_statement
nodes.summary: Lifts a bare Irene Pass-1 LO statement into a canonical provisional LearningObjective with a coerced Bloom level.

nodes.name: from_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Converts a legacy LearningObjectiveBrief into the canonical LO entity.

nodes.name: to_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Projects a canonical LO back into the legacy workbook-producer brief shape.

nodes.name: PedagogyAnnotation
nodes.summary: Frozen annotation model with triple round-trip enum validation for Bloom and role, LO-ref format checks, a bounded rationale, and timezone enforcement.

nodes.name: compute_teaches_after
nodes.summary: Derives the deterministic teaches_after ordering across annotatable components from document ordinals.

nodes.name: derive_teachable
nodes.summary: Derives the teachable verdict from front-matter resolution_status (never from citation resolutions).

nodes.name: assert_p2_frontmatter_present
nodes.summary: Fail-loud assert that every component carries the P2 universal-md front matter that P3 depends on.

nodes.name: assert_pedagogy_referential_invariant
nodes.summary: Asserts every annotation references a real component and LO, duck-typed against the enrichment result to avoid an import cycle.

nodes.name: assert_pedagogy_teachable_consistency
nodes.summary: Asserts teachable verdicts stay consistent with component resolution status.

nodes.name: build_pedagogy_annotations
nodes.summary: Top-level P3 pass producing pedagogy annotations via the offline deterministic path or the live gpt-5 leg.

nodes.name: LearningObjectiveBrief
nodes.summary: Lightweight LO brief with non-empty statement validation, used to frame Irene Pass-1.

nodes.name: PlanningContext
nodes.summary: Optional framing context (purpose, audience, LOs) with a payload projection; absent artifacts yield None.

nodes.name: PlanningContextCoverageReceipt
nodes.summary: Receipt asserting its coverage status matches the covered and uncovered objective sets.

nodes.name: assess_lo_coverage
nodes.summary: Token-overlap assessment of which ratified LOs the corpus plausibly covers, producing a coverage receipt.

nodes.name: assert_lo_coverage_or_fail
nodes.summary: Fail-loud wrapper raising when ratified LOs lack corpus coverage.

nodes.name: load_planning_context
nodes.summary: Merges on-disk ratification and ratified-LO artifacts under a run dir into a PlanningContext (None when absent).

nodes.name: GapFillTradeoff
nodes.summary: Declared gap-fill tradeoff with shape validation tying the choice to its consequence.

nodes.name: PlanningRatificationRecord
nodes.summary: Canonical ratification record enforcing non-empty fields and the anti-overclaim fence.

nodes.name: ratify_planning_decision
nodes.summary: Validates and assembles the ratification record, checking gap-fill consistency with the chosen workflow.

nodes.name: write_ratification_artifacts
nodes.summary: Persists the ratification record and canonical collateral intent to the run directory.

nodes.name: compute_selection_delta
nodes.summary: Computes the delta between baseline and ratified collateral selections.

nodes.name: SourceAssessment
nodes.summary: Assessment model (richness, source kinds, tags, gap summary) with non-empty tag validation.

nodes.name: assess_from_input_bundle
nodes.summary: Derives a SourceAssessment from a LessonPlanningInputBundle's manifest and gap records.

nodes.name: assess_from_corpus_dir
nodes.summary: Derives a SourceAssessment directly from a curated corpus directory's files.

nodes.name: assessments_differ_in_kind_or_count
nodes.summary: Compares two assessments for material differences in source kinds or counts.

nodes.name: source_point.py
nodes.summary: Atomic source-point coverage models (T3): one teaching assertion per re-segmented note span, with child sub-locator ids (component_id#ordinal), parent-only join keys, deterministic verbatim-span identity, and derived coverage intents.

nodes.name: source_type.py
nodes.summary: Closed 10-type source taxonomy for G0 enrichment with an other:<label> escape hatch, kept orthogonal to DirectiveRole; TypedSource and TypedComponent enforce triple red-rejection on unknown types and flag classification-only spans.
nodes.languageNotes: Closed enums get three rejection surfaces: a Literal validator, the JSON-Schema enum array, and a TypeAdapter round-trip.

nodes.name: coverage_anchors.py
nodes.summary: Pure, offline-testable deck-side coverage join (Step 0): resolves the final-slide-to-source slide_key map from slide-brief lineage and projects deck plus narration text into coverage anchors keyed by slide_key, with reconciliation passed in rather than computed.

nodes.name: coverage_gate_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator wiring for the coverage gate (T6): env feature flags, disk-primary receipt I/O, the receipt-expected marker, and the both-walks seam callable that enforces the gate before any audio-spending specialist dispatch.

nodes.name: coverage_runner.py
nodes.summary: Runner-integration glue for the G3 coverage seam: marshals the run's own deck and narration exports into anchors, derives and writes the coverage receipt idempotently at both walk sites, and renders the standalone coverage-report.html.

nodes.name: enrichment_consumption.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator-side P5 consumption projecting the frozen G0 enrichment into the two learner-facing seams: per-slide voice-direction seeds for narration (pedagogical role to delivery) and a structured deck-directive hint for Gary's additional_instructions.

nodes.name: g0_enrichment_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Runner-wired G0 pre-pass orchestration hook: enumerates and fingerprints the corpus, splits files into typed components (offline heuristics or the live LLM extraction leg with salvage parsing), extracts provisional LOs, attaches pedagogy/coverage/citation overlays, and freezes the cached G0EnrichmentResult for the G0E gate.
nodes.languageNotes: The frozen result is cache-keyed to a corpus fingerprint for replay determinism; live-response parsing includes truncated-payload salvage.

nodes.name: irene_refinement_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Runner-wired Irene refinement hook (G0-S3): consumes gate-confirmed provisional LOs from g0-enrichment.json, refines them with Bloom levels and advisory adequacy, freezes the signed LO-delta contract to irene-refinement.json, and feeds operator ratify-gate G0R on both walks.

nodes.name: SourcePoint
nodes.summary: Frozen assertion model with round-trip risk/intent/segmentation enums, verbatim-span identity invariants, and a parent join-key projection.

nodes.name: make_source_point_id
nodes.summary: Builds the child sub-locator id component_id#ordinal for one assertion.

nodes.name: join_key
nodes.summary: The only sanctioned join surface — returns the parent component_id, never the child sub-locator id.

nodes.name: assert_join_key
nodes.summary: Fail-loud guard making any join attempted on the child #ordinal id a loud violation.

nodes.name: derive_coverage_intents
nodes.summary: Deterministically derives coverage intents for a point from its type and risk flags.

nodes.name: OtherSourceType
nodes.summary: Escape-hatch type carrying a non-blank label for spans outside the closed 10-type enum.

nodes.name: TypedSource
nodes.summary: File-level typed source rejecting unknown types and enforcing the escape-hatch/flag pairing.

nodes.name: TypedComponent
nodes.summary: Intra-document typed component (locator plus verbatim excerpt) with the same closed-enum enforcement — the unit G0 segmentation produces.

nodes.name: resolve_slide_key_map
nodes.summary: Builds the primary {final_slide_id: slide_key} map from slide_briefs.source_ref lineage, omitting drifted briefs rather than guessing.

nodes.name: resolve_slide_key_lineage
nodes.summary: Resolves slide-key lineage with positional fallback from authoritative plan_units when briefs are unavailable.

nodes.name: build_coverage_anchors
nodes.summary: Pure reconciliation core joining deck rows and narration rows into per-slide_key anchor text, with reconciliation passed in.

nodes.name: mark_coverage_receipt_expected
nodes.summary: Drops the past-G3 marker so a later derive failure still trips the fail-loud gate instead of silently bypassing it.

nodes.name: write_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: Persists the derived coverage receipt JSON as the disk-primary artifact.

nodes.name: note_bearing_content_exists
nodes.summary: Checks whether the run's enrichment actually contains note-bearing content worth gating on.

nodes.name: enforce_coverage_gate_before_audio
nodes.summary: The seam callable invoked at the shared dispatch site on both walks — loads the receipt and asserts the gate before ElevenLabs/Descript spend.

nodes.name: _select_plan_units
nodes.summary: Selects the authoritative plan_units candidate (locked, count-matched, non-ambiguous) from lesson-plan candidates.

nodes.name: _collision_aware_slide_key_map
nodes.summary: Builds the slide-key map while detecting ordinal collisions and recording them as diagnostics.

nodes.name: _marshal_coverage_surfaces
nodes.summary: Marshals deck rows (gary-dispatch-payload) and narration rows (segment-manifest) into coverage anchors with lineage bridging.

nodes.name: _write_coverage_report_html
nodes.summary: Renders the standalone coverage-report.html and links it from the run summary.

nodes.name: _derive_and_write_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: The one shared G3 helper both walks call: drops the expected marker first, loads annotations, marshals surfaces, derives and writes the receipt, and renders the report.

nodes.name: role_to_voice_direction
nodes.summary: Maps a pedagogical role to its frozen voice_direction default via the PEDAGOGICAL_ROLE_TO_VOICE table.

nodes.name: source_slide_ordinals
nodes.summary: Extracts the source slide ordinals a component teaches from its document locator.

nodes.name: project_role_derived_voice_by_slide
nodes.summary: Projects role-derived voice-direction seeds keyed by slide ordinal for the narration specialist (Irene Pass-2).

nodes.name: project_ambiguous_narration_ordinals
nodes.summary: Reports slide ordinals whose narration role seeds are ambiguous (zero or multiple candidates) instead of silently dropping them.

nodes.name: project_deck_enrichment_hint
nodes.summary: Builds the short structured role/LO hint routed only into Gary's additional_instructions, structurally barred from the preserved card body.

nodes.name: resolve_enrichment_mode
nodes.summary: Resolves the enrichment mode (off, offline, live) from env flags and run context.

nodes.name: _split_components
nodes.summary: Splits a source file's text into intra-document components by structural heuristics.

nodes.name: flag_ungrounded_components
nodes.summary: Flags components whose excerpts fail verbatim groundedness against the source text.

nodes.name: _offline_pre_pass
nodes.summary: Deterministic offline pre-pass building typed components and provisional LOs without any LLM call.

nodes.name: _live_pre_pass
nodes.summary: Live LLM extraction pass over the enumerated corpus with per-request timeouts and parse salvage.

nodes.name: _parse_live_payload
nodes.summary: Parses and coerces the live extraction payload into typed components and LOs with strict shape recovery.

nodes.name: build_enrichment_result
nodes.summary: Assembles the full G0EnrichmentResult: provenance, anti-anchoring sidecars, dissent, pedagogy/coverage overlays, and citation resolutions.

nodes.name: run_g0_enrichment
nodes.summary: The runner hook at the g0-enrichment node: fingerprint-keyed cache check, pre-pass execution, and result freeze to g0-enrichment.json.

nodes.name: load_enrichment_result
nodes.summary: Loads the frozen g0-enrichment.json back into a G0EnrichmentResult.

nodes.name: _load_confirmed_provisional_los
nodes.summary: Reads the gate-#1-confirmed provisional LOs from the frozen g0-enrichment.json.

nodes.name: build_result_for_run
nodes.summary: Builds the Irene refinement result for a run from its confirmed provisional LOs.

nodes.name: run_irene_refinement
nodes.summary: The runner hook at the irene-refinement node: cache check, refinement build, completeness assert, and freeze to irene-refinement.json.

nodes.name: load_refinement_result
nodes.summary: Loads the frozen irene-refinement.json summary result.

nodes.name: load_refinement_full
nodes.summary: Loads the full refinement artifact including the delta ledger for the G0R gate presentation.

nodes.name: gh_pages_publish.py
nodes.summary: Shared GitHub Pages publish transport (clone -> stage -> commit -> push) with three fail-loud hygiene guards -- retention pruning, published-size cap, and verify-after-push -- so the public asset-host repo can never again silently exceed the 1 GB Pages cap and freeze builds.
nodes.languageNotes: Consolidates the near-identical publish transport the picker and chooser publishers each carried; scrubs tokens from git output before surfacing errors.

nodes.name: picker_html_emitter.py
nodes.summary: Renders the static, dependency-free gh-pages styleguide Picker page and decodes the operator's pasted SELECTION CODE back into an {A: slug, B: slug?} pick map.
nodes.languageNotes: Return-path twin of the chooser HTML emitter: the page builds a copyable code client-side; no server round-trip from the public site.

nodes.name: picker_publisher.py
nodes.summary: Publishes the styleguide Picker to GitHub Pages as a self-contained static pack (index.html plus roster thumbnails), delegating transport, token-scrub, and verify-after-push to the shared gh_pages_publish helper.

nodes.name: pre_gate_marcus.py
nodes.summary: Shared pre-gate LLM node (Story 7a.3): renders a Jinja2 template-with-slots prompt per conversational gate (G1, G2C, G3, G4), invokes the Marcus chat model, and returns a structured PreFillProposal the runner threads into decision cards.
nodes.languageNotes: Never promotes a gate from non-blocking to blocking (Composition Spec 3.5 unaltered).

nodes.name: production_runner.py
nodes.summary: Production-graph runner composition layer: drives the full trial lifecycle (start, resume, batch-resume, recover walks), specialist dispatch with retry, HIL gate pauses and decision cards, envelope persistence, operator-surface emission, and cost recording for migrated trials.
nodes.languageNotes: Two node walks coexist: the start walk stops at G1 while _continue_production_walk owns G2B+ -- gate-pause side-effects must land in BOTH walks.

nodes.name: research_detective_gate.py
nodes.summary: R7 research-detective hard-pause gate: when MARCUS_RESEARCH_DETECTIVE_LIVE is on, Irene Pass-2 (manifest node 08) cannot dispatch until an operator disposition receipt (approve/reject/defer) is on disk.
nodes.languageNotes: Enforced from the shared _dispatch_specialist_at_node site so both runner walks get identical teeth.

nodes.name: research_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Wires the pre-built Irene->Tracy->Texas research bridge through the production runner's node walk so research-enrichment goals on in-scope plan units produce cited research entries carrying source_ref/source_hash for the workbook producer.
nodes.languageNotes: Attaches at the plan-lock fanout node (manifest 04.55); degrades loudly when Scite/Consensus credentials are absent instead of fabricating citations.

nodes.name: routing.py
nodes.summary: Manifest-driven specialist routing: maps a manifest step to a RoutingDecision naming the specialist Marcus should dispatch next.

nodes.name: _sanitize_pack
nodes.summary: Validates every filename in a publish pack against path-traversal and unsafe-character rules before staging.

nodes.name: prune_retention
nodes.summary: Deletes managed packs older than max_age_days by git committer date, honoring a protected allowlist, and returns a PruneReport of reclaimed bytes.

nodes.name: project_published_size
nodes.summary: Projects the post-publish total size of the pages repo and refuses (SizeGuardRefusal) when it would breach the configured cap.

nodes.name: _verify_page_live
nodes.summary: Polls the published URL until it serves the expected content or the verify budget is exhausted.

nodes.name: verify_build_after_push
nodes.summary: Confirms via the GitHub Pages build API that the push actually produced a successful build before declaring the publish done.

nodes.name: git_publish_dir
nodes.summary: Core transport: clones the pages repo, stages the sanitized pack under the target path, commits, pushes with token-scrubbed error surfaces, and runs the hygiene guards.

nodes.name: load_hygiene_config
nodes.summary: Loads retention/size/verify hygiene configuration for the publish guards from the repo config surface.

nodes.name: build_selection_code
nodes.summary: Builds the human-copyable SELECTION CODE string encoding run tag plus the A (and optional B) styleguide picks.

nodes.name: decode_picker_selection_code
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates a pasted SELECTION CODE back into an {A: slug, B: slug?} map, fail-louding on tag mismatch or malformed picks.

nodes.name: _static_thumbnail
nodes.summary: Resolves each roster guide's thumbnail to the relative path used by the static page pack.

nodes.name: _render_static_card
nodes.summary: Renders one styleguide card (thumbnail, metadata, pick controls) as static HTML.

nodes.name: _page_js
nodes.summary: Emits the inline dependency-free JavaScript that drives pick toggling and client-side SELECTION CODE assembly on the static page.

nodes.name: render_picker_static_html
nodes.summary: Assembles the complete static Picker page (cards, inline JS, code box) for the gh-pages pack.

nodes.name: publish_picker
nodes.summary: Builds the self-contained Picker pack (index.html plus thumbnails), publishes it via the shared gh-pages transport, and returns the public URL and receipts.

nodes.name: _git_publish_dir
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper delegating pack publication to the shared gh_pages_publish.git_publish_dir transport with picker hygiene config.

nodes.name: PreFillProposal
nodes.summary: Structured Pydantic contract for the pre-gate LLM's drafted proposal threaded into the runner's decision cards.

nodes.name: render_pre_fill_prompt
nodes.summary: Renders the per-gate Jinja2 template-with-slots prompt from docs/conversational-gates/<gate>.j2.

nodes.name: invoke_pre_gate_marcus
nodes.summary: Single LLM call site: invokes the Marcus chat model on the rendered gate prompt and parses the response into a PreFillProposal.

nodes.name: _parse_pre_fill_response
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the raw LLM response text into a PreFillProposal, tolerating fenced JSON.

nodes.name: emit_registered_and_terminal_trace
nodes.summary: Emits the registered/terminal trace record for a trial so external observers see a consistent lifecycle trail.

nodes.name: _run_start_preflight_gate
nodes.summary: Runs the fail-loud start preflight (env, corpus, directive, credentials) and raises PreflightGateFailed before any spend when a check fails.

nodes.name: _build_decision_card
nodes.summary: Assembles the HIL decision card for a gate pause: candidates, voice/variant options, drafted proposal, cost readings, and digest bindings.

nodes.name: _runner_payload_for_specialist
nodes.summary: Builds the full dispatch payload for a specialist node: upstream contributions, directive-derived settings, gamma settings, cluster floors, and execution-mode overlays.

nodes.name: _pause_at_gate
nodes.summary: Pauses the walk at a conversational gate: persists the envelope and decision card, registers the resume record, and emits operator-surface state.

nodes.name: _dispatch_specialist_at_node
nodes.summary: Shared dispatch site for both walks: enforces research-detective and UDAC gates, resolves consumed assets, invokes the specialist with retry, and records the contribution.

nodes.name: _pause_at_error
nodes.summary: Converts a specialist failure into a resumable error pause with persisted envelope, scrubbed error surface, and recovery affordances.

nodes.name: _pause_at_provider_batch
nodes.summary: Pauses the walk while a provider-side batch job is in flight, persisting receipts so a later resume can collect results.

nodes.name: run_production_trial
nodes.summary: Entry point for the start walk: preflight, manifest compile, node-by-node specialist dispatch with gate pauses up to G1, envelope/cost persistence, and trial-envelope finalization.

nodes.name: resume_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a paused trial from an operator verdict: validates the decision card binding, applies the verdict to run state, and re-enters the continuation walk.

nodes.name: resume_batch_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a trial paused on a provider batch job: collects batch results, reconciles receipts, and continues the walk.

nodes.name: recover_production_trial
nodes.summary: Recovers a trial from its frozen on-disk run record (envelope, directive, decision card) after a crash or interrupted session.

nodes.name: _continue_production_walk
nodes.summary: Continuation walk owning G2B+ nodes: applies variant selections and ratifications, dispatches remaining specialists, and finalizes the trial -- the second of the runner's two walk bodies.

nodes.name: write_landing_point
nodes.summary: Writes the landing-point receipt marking where the research-detective pause landed in the run.

nodes.name: write_disposition
nodes.summary: Persists the operator's disposition receipt (approve/reject/defer) that can unlock Irene Pass-2.

nodes.name: load_disposition
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the disposition receipt from the run directory.

nodes.name: enforce_before_pass2
nodes.summary: Hard gate check at the dispatch site: raises ResearchDetectiveGateError when Pass-2 would dispatch without an unlocking disposition on disk.

nodes.name: consensus_creds_present
nodes.summary: Checks whether Consensus retrieval credentials are present in the environment for live research dispatch.

nodes.name: resolve_research_posture
nodes.summary: Resolves the run's research posture (live, degraded, off) from env flags and credential presence.

nodes.name: DeterministicPostureSelector
nodes.summary: Deterministic selector that maps plan/goal context to a research posture without an LLM, keeping posture decisions replayable.

nodes.name: has_research_goals
nodes.summary: Returns whether the locked plan carries any research-enrichment goals that warrant Texas dispatch.

nodes.name: _dispatch_intents_to_texas
nodes.summary: Dispatches the derived retrieval intents to the Texas specialist bridge and collects raw results.

nodes.name: run_research_wiring
nodes.summary: Main wiring node: derives research goals from the locked plan, dispatches intents through Irene->Tracy->Texas, degrades loudly on missing credentials, and attaches cited research entries to the envelope.

nodes.name: research_entries_from_envelope
nodes.summary: Extracts the accumulated cited research entries back out of the production envelope for downstream consumers.

nodes.name: RoutingDecision
nodes.summary: Value object naming the specialist (and dispatch mode) chosen for a manifest step.

nodes.name: route_step
nodes.summary: Maps a manifest step to a RoutingDecision, fail-louding on steps with no routable specialist.

nodes.name: slide_variant_selection.py
nodes.summary: Parses the Storyboard-A chooser code (SBA-<run_tag>-1:A 2:B ...) pasted as the G2B verdict edit_payload into a {slide_id: variant} map and fail-louds on any coverage gap so a partial or stale pick can never silently default downstream.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_writer.py
nodes.summary: Thin orchestrator-facing shim re-exporting the specialist summary writer API from app.models.state so specialist graphs can emit summaries without importing app.marcus and breaking lane contracts.

nodes.name: styleguide_picker.py
nodes.summary: Pre-run local HTML style-picker at CD-entry: renders a card-grid page from the CD-owned styleguide SSOT, serves it on an ephemeral localhost port, captures the operator's pick via a single POST, and writes it into the run directive plus an append-only pick-event ledger.
nodes.languageNotes: Same-origin end-to-end (page served by the capture server itself) so the receipt fetch is never CORS-blocked; advisory file locks guard concurrent pick writes.

nodes.name: supervisor.py
nodes.summary: Supervisor preset routing adapting the Slab 3 FR27 preset switch onto the marcus package without disturbing the legacy lesson-planner flow.

nodes.name: udac_wiring.py
nodes.summary: UDAC v1 orchestrator wiring: the gate-crossing WRITER that records asset ratification in both walk bodies plus the fail-loud dispatch-site READER that resolves the assets a specialist consumes.
nodes.languageNotes: Writer fires in BOTH walks (start reaches G1; continuation owns G2B+), idempotent and monotonic; reader lives at the shared dispatch site so it is walk-invariant.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the runtime-owned Pydantic models: AdhocResponse, ProductionEnvelope, ProductionTrialEnvelope, and the trial-economics report family.

nodes.name: adhoc_response.py
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic response contract for one-shot Marcus ad-hoc asks: AdhocResponse plus a TokenCount whose total must cover its parts.

nodes.name: production_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict cross-specialist accumulator for production composition: SpecialistContribution entries with tz-aware timestamps and enforced output digests, collected and queried through ProductionEnvelope.

nodes.name: parse_selection_code
nodes.summary: Parses the SBA-<run_tag>-1:A 2:B ... chooser code into an ordered slide-index -> variant mapping, rejecting malformed tokens.

nodes.name: validate_selections
nodes.summary: Validates total coverage of the parsed selections against the deck (exactly one variant per slide, keyed by slide_id) and fail-louds on gaps.

nodes.name: read_pick_events
nodes.summary: Reads the append-only pick-event ledger, tolerating and reporting corrupt lines.

nodes.name: load_picker_roster
nodes.summary: Loads the pickable styleguide roster from the CD-owned SSOT, resolving thumbnails and last-used metadata per guide.

nodes.name: _render_card
nodes.summary: Renders one styleguide card (thumbnail, palette, last-used, pick button) for the local picker page.

nodes.name: render_picker_html
nodes.summary: Renders the complete local card-grid picker page with same-origin POST-back pick capture.

nodes.name: _PickHandler
nodes.summary: http.server request handler that serves the picker page and thumbnails and accepts exactly one valid POST /pick before the server exits.

nodes.name: capture_pick
nodes.summary: Serves the picker on an ephemeral localhost port, opens the browser, and blocks until one valid pick POST (or CLI fallback) is captured.

nodes.name: write_pick_to_directive
nodes.summary: Writes the captured pick into the run directive's binding surface under an advisory lock, validating guide pickability and preserving prior directive content.

nodes.name: append_pick_event
nodes.summary: Appends the pick to the append-only pick-event ledger with content hashes for audit and last-used tracking.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point wiring roster load, capture, directive write, and ledger append into one operator-facing pick ceremony.

nodes.name: Supervisor
nodes.summary: Preset-routing supervisor exposing mode selection and run_step dispatch for the FR27 preset switch.

nodes.name: udac_active
nodes.summary: Feature-flag check for whether UDAC v1 asset-index wiring is active for this run.

nodes.name: record_gate_ratification
nodes.summary: Gate-crossing WRITER: records ratified assets into the run asset index when the operator clears a gate; idempotent and monotonic, fired from both walk bodies.

nodes.name: resolve_consumed_assets
nodes.summary: Dispatch-site READER: resolves the ratified assets a specialist consumes and fail-louds when a required asset is missing from the index.

nodes.name: TokenCount
nodes.summary: Token accounting model whose total must cover its input/output parts (validator-enforced).

nodes.name: AdhocResponse
nodes.summary: Strict response contract for a one-shot Marcus ad-hoc ask, pairing the answer text with its TokenCount.

nodes.name: compute_output_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical sha256 digest of a contribution output used for tamper-evident binding.

nodes.name: SpecialistContribution
nodes.summary: One specialist's contribution: node id, tz-aware timestamp, output payload, and a validator-enforced output digest; constructed via from_output.

nodes.name: ProductionEnvelope
nodes.summary: Cross-specialist accumulator with UUID4 trial binding: add/get/latest contribution queries plus drop_contributions_from_nodes for rewind support.

nodes.name: production_trial_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict envelope for production-graph trial lifecycle state, enforcing UUID4 trial ids, tz-aware start/complete timestamps, and lifecycle-consistency invariants.

nodes.name: trial_economics_report.py
nodes.summary: Per-trial economics report models: AgentCostEntry, DriftAlert, BudgetStatus, and the aggregate TrialEconomicsReport with cross-field cost-posture and non-negativity invariants.

nodes.name: component_selection.py
nodes.summary: ComponentSelection -- the canonical frozen record of which components a run composes; lives on RunState so the resume/recover walk rehydrates the selection from the frozen run record and never re-defaults (the two-walk trap).

nodes.name: operator_verdict.py
nodes.summary: Frozen OperatorVerdict value object for HIL gate decisions (FR31/FR34) with UUID4, tz-aware, sha256-digest, and tamper-evidence invariants, plus a small CLI that emits the JSON schema.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_artifacts.py
nodes.summary: Specialist summary persistence for adjacent gate context: builds length-bounded summary text from run state and contributions, emits it to the run's summary directory, and loads the most recent summary back.

nodes.name: operator_verdict_validators.py
nodes.summary: Standalone cross-field validators for OperatorVerdict: tamper-verb rejection (second layer of the FR34 triple-layer red-rejection) and verb/payload consistency enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Re-checks fire on validate_assignment mutations and model_construct paths that bypass the Literal field type; the schema-pin test is the third layer.

nodes.name: cascade_config.py
nodes.summary: Operator-editable cascade and pricing config loaders for economics: YAML-with-digest loading, alias-collision rejection, per-model cost computation, and a pricing-coverage check plus a small CLI.

nodes.name: economics.py
nodes.summary: Per-trial cost measurement and persistence for the migrated runtime: fetches LangSmith traces, attributes billable LLM runs per agent, reconciles Pass-1 provider attempts against the call journal, renders markdown cost reports, and atomically persists the cost artifact set with budget and drift checks.
nodes.languageNotes: Cost artifacts are written under an exclusive lock with fsync + transaction-recovery so a crash mid-write never leaves a torn report.

nodes.name: ProductionTrialEnvelope
nodes.summary: Trial lifecycle envelope enforcing UUID4 trial id, tz-aware started/completed timestamps, and lifecycle-consistency invariants across status transitions.

nodes.name: TrialEconomicsReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate per-trial economics report with validators tying cost posture to unavailable-count, tz-aware timestamps, and non-negative model costs.

nodes.name: ComponentSelection
nodes.summary: Frozen record of the components a run composes, with production_default factory, selection queries, and canonical_bytes for digest binding; rehydrated on resume/recover.

nodes.name: OperatorVerdict
nodes.summary: Frozen HIL verdict value object (approve/edit/reject) with UUID4, tz-aware, and sha256-digest field validators plus cross-field tamper-evidence invariants.

nodes.name: canonical_specialist_id
nodes.summary: Normalizes a specialist identifier to its canonical form used for summary file naming.

nodes.name: build_summary_text
nodes.summary: Builds the length-bounded summary text (received keys, decisions, artifacts, trail) for a specialist's adjacent-gate context.

nodes.name: emit_summary
nodes.summary: Writes a specialist summary artifact to the run's summary directory with a safe timestamped filename.

nodes.name: emit_summary_for_state
nodes.summary: Convenience emitter deriving the summary content directly from run state and the latest contribution.

nodes.name: load_most_recent_summary
nodes.summary: Loads the most recent summary for a specialist from disk by parsed timestamp, returning an AdjacentSummary.

nodes.name: enforce_no_tamper_verbs
nodes.summary: Rejects tamper verbs on OperatorVerdict even via paths that bypass the Literal field type (validate_assignment mutations, model_construct).

nodes.name: enforce_verb_payload_consistency
nodes.summary: Enforces that the verdict verb and its payload agree (e.g., edit requires an edit_payload; approve forbids one).

nodes.name: normalize_agent_name
nodes.summary: Normalizes an agent name to the canonical lowercase key used across cascade and pricing lookups.

nodes.name: CascadeConfig
nodes.summary: Cascade configuration model with alias-collision rejection and resolve_entry lookup from agent name to its cascade entry.

nodes.name: PricingTable
nodes.summary: Model pricing table computing per-call USD cost from token usage for a given model id.

nodes.name: load_cascade
nodes.summary: Loads the operator-editable cascade YAML with a content digest for provenance.

nodes.name: load_pricing
nodes.summary: Loads the operator-editable pricing YAML with a content digest for provenance.

nodes.name: ensure_pricing_covers_cascade
nodes.summary: Fail-loud check that every model referenced by the cascade has a pricing entry.

nodes.name: check_trial_budget
nodes.summary: Compares a trial's measured cost against the configured budget and returns the BudgetStatus.

nodes.name: compute_per_agent_drift
nodes.summary: Computes per-agent cost drift against report history and emits DriftAlerts for agents exceeding thresholds.

nodes.name: measure_trial_cost
nodes.summary: Core measurement: fetches the trial's LangSmith trace, filters billable LLM runs, attributes usage per agent via cascade/pricing config, and assembles the TrialEconomicsReport.

nodes.name: _load_pass1_provider_attempts
nodes.summary: Loads Pass-1 provider attempt records from the call journal for reconciliation against trace-derived costs.

nodes.name: _reconcile_pass1_provider_attempts
nodes.summary: Reconciles journal-recorded Pass-1 provider attempts with trace-derived runs so retries and provider fallbacks are billed exactly once.

nodes.name: _render_cost_report_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the human-readable markdown cost report (per-agent table, drift alerts, budget status, trace links).

nodes.name: _persist_cost_artifact_set
nodes.summary: Atomically persists the JSON + markdown cost artifact pair under the exclusive report lock with fsync and transaction markers.

nodes.name: record_trial_cost_report
nodes.summary: Public entry: measures the trial cost and persists the full cost artifact set for the run.

nodes.name: summarize_cost_reports
nodes.summary: Summarizes persisted cost reports across trials for cross-trial economics review.

nodes.name: load_trace_fixture
nodes.summary: Loads a recorded LangSmith trace fixture so cost measurement is testable without live API access.

nodes.name: ask_a_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Strict, model-free Pydantic contracts for the workbook Ask-A research seam: retrieval scope, knowledge entries, execution receipts, intake reconciliation, and disposition-gated contribution output.
nodes.languageNotes: Every payload is bound by SHA-256 digests over canonical JSON so contributions can be replay-verified without trusting the writer.

nodes.name: AskARetrievalScopeV1
nodes.summary: Digest-bound retrieval scope pinning the Ask-A research query, abilities, bold terms, and provider posture so downstream evidence stays traceable to a frozen demand.

nodes.name: AskAKnowledgeEntryV1
nodes.summary: Strict knowledge-entry model for a single retrieved citation: provider provenance, reliability tiering, evidence excerpt hashes, and matched ability/bold-term associations.

nodes.name: AskAExecutionReceiptV1
nodes.summary: Execution receipt binding provider iterations, outcomes, and refinement logs to a scope digest; builds a digest over the whole receipt for tamper evidence.

nodes.name: AskAResearchIntakeV1
nodes.summary: Intake summary reconciling covered vs uncovered ability IDs and bold terms against the retrieval scope, with an intake digest binding scope and receipt.

nodes.name: AskAContributionOutputV1
nodes.summary: Terminal contribution output enforcing closed disposition rules (completed vs retryable) over research entries, known losses, and the intake evidence chain.

nodes.name: derive_scite_query
nodes.summary: Derives a deterministic Scite search query from an Ask-A research demand's abilities and bold terms.

nodes.name: build_scope
nodes.summary: Builds an AskARetrievalScopeV1 from a research demand, provider config fingerprint, and posture, computing the binding digests.

nodes.name: match_scope_associations
nodes.summary: Matches a retrieved document's title/body tokens against scope abilities and bold terms to produce association evidence.

nodes.name: check_on_learning_projection.py
nodes.summary: Pure Promise-bound retrieval-check projection (Story 37.3): contracts, writer seam, and a deep candidate gate that enforces source-grounded answer keys with numeric/negation witnesses and anti-forgery result replay.
nodes.languageNotes: The 126-line candidate gate cross-checks every answer claim against declared source spans; results revalidate themselves via embedded authority snapshots.

nodes.name: RetrievalCheckItem
nodes.summary: A single retrieval-practice check item binding an ability to a learner prompt, expected answer, and source-claim-traced answer claims.

nodes.name: CheckOnLearningRequest
nodes.summary: Closed authority request carrying the lesson promise, quantity-unit tokens, source spans, and source claims; validates that all cross-references stay inside the declared authority.

nodes.name: CheckOnLearningWriterCandidate
nodes.summary: Honest writer-candidate envelope: authored items plus known losses and a degradation marker, with shape rules keyed to status.

nodes.name: CheckGateReceipt
nodes.summary: Gate receipt reconciling declared vs covered ability/claim/span IDs, pre-gate disposition, failures, and operator warnings under both authority and candidate digests.

nodes.name: CheckOnLearningResult
nodes.summary: Anti-forgery final result that replays the gate over its own embedded authority and candidate snapshot so a forged pass cannot survive revalidation.

nodes.name: _candidate_gate
nodes.summary: Core candidate gate: verifies ability coverage, claim/span reference closure, answer-key completeness, numeric and negation witnesses, and prompt-format rules for each check item.

nodes.name: offline_check_on_learning_writer
nodes.summary: Offline writer seam that returns an honest unavailable candidate, letting the pipeline degrade without a model call.

nodes.name: compose_check_on_learning
nodes.summary: Pure composition entry point: pre-gates the request, invokes the writer, gates the candidate, and assembles a digest-bound CheckOnLearningResult.

nodes.name: deep_dive_from_run.py
nodes.summary: M3-safe adapter that reads a frozen run's slide authority, segment manifests, and speaker notes to construct the Deep Dive skeleton request without importing orchestrator code.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a duplicate-key-rejecting YAML SafeLoader and path-containment checks before trusting any run artifact.

nodes.name: _speaker_note
nodes.summary: Extracts and authenticates the speaker-note text for a slide from verified source bytes.

nodes.name: _slide_inventory
nodes.summary: Builds an inventory of slides under the course source root, mapping slide identity to source files.

nodes.name: _load_segments
nodes.summary: Loads and digest-verifies run segment manifests, rejecting mismatched or malformed manifest bytes.

nodes.name: load_deep_dive_segments
nodes.summary: Public wrapper that loads Deep Dive segments from a run directory with manifest verification.

nodes.name: build_deep_dive_request
nodes.summary: Main adapter: projects frozen lesson authority (slide authority map, promise, run segments, speaker notes) into a source-grounded DeepDiveSkeletonRequest.

nodes.name: deep_dive_projection.py
nodes.summary: Pure, source-bound contracts and gates for the workbook Deep Dive skeleton: request/writer/gate/result seam where a writer may re-voice prose but only declared claim IDs earn credit.

nodes.name: DeepDiveSkeletonRequest
nodes.summary: Closed authority request for the Deep Dive skeleton: source spans, source claims, abilities, and the slide-authority-map digest, with reference-closure validation.

nodes.name: DeepDiveSkeletonWriterResult
nodes.summary: Writer candidate carrying authored ability sections and bold terms with honest-shape rules per status.

nodes.name: DeepDiveGateReceipt
nodes.summary: Gate receipt tracking VO/delta claim coverage, unknown references, and failures, with status-matches-failures reconciliation.

nodes.name: DeepDiveSkeletonResult
nodes.summary: Digest-bound final result embedding the authority, candidate snapshot, and gate receipt with honest-result validation.

nodes.name: _gate
nodes.summary: Core Deep Dive gate: verifies claim/span/ability reference closure, VO-claim coverage, numeric witnesses, negation counts, and bold-term source containment.

nodes.name: deterministic_deep_dive_writer
nodes.summary: Deterministic non-LLM writer that distributes source claims across abilities and safely bold-wraps terms, producing a gate-passing skeleton.

nodes.name: offline_deep_dive_writer
nodes.summary: Offline writer seam returning an honest unavailable candidate for degraded operation.

nodes.name: compose_deep_dive_skeleton
nodes.summary: Pure composition entry point: runs the writer, gates the candidate, and assembles the digest-bound DeepDiveSkeletonResult.

nodes.name: deep_dive_provider_contract.py
nodes.summary: Pure provider-payload identity and normalization for Deep Dive execution: canonical JSON mapping, payload digests, and strict payload normalization.

nodes.name: canonical_json_mapping
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes a raw provider payload into a deterministic JSON mapping for digesting.

nodes.name: provider_payload_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the SHA-256 identity digest over a canonicalized provider payload.

nodes.name: normalize_deep_dive_provider_payload
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw Deep Dive provider payload into the strict shape expected by the projection gate, rejecting malformed structures.

nodes.name: drill_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects frozen G0 enrichment cards into DrillSpec inputs (Mine 5): read-only card consumption with no network or model calls, kept import-linter M3 safe.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_drill_inputs
nodes.summary: Read-only projection from a frozen G0 enrichment card into DrillSpec practice items, sanitizing IDs and collecting warnings for empty or unusable source components.

nodes.name: drill_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders DrillSpec to a Markdown artifact family (Mine 5) - short practice items only, deliberately without the workbook's REVOICE/DOCX/depth-delta machinery.

nodes.name: render_drill_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a DrillSpec into the drill Markdown artifact: title, LO-linked practice items with prompts, expected focus, and source references.

nodes.name: write_drill_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered drill Markdown to the output path, raising DrillProducerError on failure.

nodes.name: drill_spec.py
nodes.summary: Drill collateral content model (Mine 5): a minimal, LO-linked short-practice schema kept as a distinct artifact family from WorkbookSpec.

nodes.name: DrillPracticeItem
nodes.summary: A single LO-linked drill practice item with prompt, expected focus, and non-empty source references.

nodes.name: DrillSpec
nodes.summary: Top-level drill artifact spec with closed kind, schema version, title, and practice items.

nodes.name: lesson_type_classifier.py
nodes.summary: Pure, closed lesson-type classification used by pre-work Scene composition: evidence model, closed classification result, and a deterministic classifier.

nodes.name: LessonTypeEvidence
nodes.summary: Evidence inputs for lesson-type classification (fresh pain, bridge identity, skill build) with traceable unique evidence refs.

nodes.name: LessonTypeClassification
nodes.summary: Closed classification result binding status, lesson type, archetype, and confidence with disposition rules.

nodes.name: classify_lesson_type
nodes.summary: Pure classifier mapping evidence flags to a closed lesson-type/archetype decision for pre-work Scene composition.

nodes.name: pass1_authority.py
nodes.summary: Canonical durable-identity receipt for Irene Pass-1 lesson plans: turns per-node contribution history into a digest-bound receipt so later refinements cannot reuse identities that disappeared from an intermediate plan.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately pure: validation never repairs; every failure raises Pass1PlanAuthorityError.

nodes.name: assert_unique_plan_unit_ids
nodes.summary: Asserts that every unit ID in an Irene Pass-1 plan is unique, failing loudly on collisions.

nodes.name: validate_receipt
nodes.summary: Validates a Pass-1 plan-authority receipt end to end: digests, identity rows, cluster authority, v2 projection, and catalog history, never repairing invalid shapes.

nodes.name: finalize_plan_authority
nodes.summary: Finalizes a plan into a digest-bound authority receipt against authenticated source sections, carrying prior-receipt identity history forward so vanished identities cannot be reused.

nodes.name: assert_receipt_matches_plan
nodes.summary: Asserts that a receipt's identity rows match the current plan, rejecting drift between plan and durable authority.

nodes.name: pass1_call_journal.py
nodes.summary: Crash-safe provider-call evidence journal for Irene Pass-1: committed before dispatch and immediately after response, so a pre-dispatch record can never authorize an automatic recall while a returned response is replayable only through deterministic validation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses atomic JSON writes with directory fsync, secret scrubbing, and a versioned response-processor contract (v1/v2) for byte-level candidate provenance.

nodes.name: build_pass1_call_identity
nodes.summary: Builds the canonical call identity (run, node, model, config, catalog, messages digests) that keys a Pass-1 provider call journal.

nodes.name: validate_provider_evidence
nodes.summary: Validates provider-evidence shape (response type/ID, usage and response metadata) against closed key sets.

nodes.name: validate_pass1_call_journal
nodes.summary: Validates a journal file's full shape and state machine, including identity binding and response-processing records.

nodes.name: begin_or_resume_pass1_call
nodes.summary: Commits a pre-dispatch journal record or resumes an existing one, returning a Pass1CallResume that distinguishes replayable responses from ambiguous pre-dispatch states.

nodes.name: record_pass1_response
nodes.summary: Atomically records the raw provider response and validated provider evidence immediately after return.

nodes.name: record_pass1_candidate_processing
nodes.summary: Records the deterministic response-processing step (framing, byte removal, processed-candidate digest) under the versioned processor contract.

nodes.name: complete_pass1_call
nodes.summary: Completes the journal by binding the final result identity and output, closing the call's evidence chain.

nodes.name: pass1_source_span_catalog.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic exact-source-span selection for Irene Pass-1: the model picks stable span identities while this module projects the literal source_refs bytes from the same authenticated sections the authority validator uses.

nodes.name: Pass1SourceSpanV1
nodes.summary: A single authenticated source span: source identity/digests, character range, literal text, and text digest, with identity validation.

nodes.name: Pass1SourceSpanCatalogV1
nodes.summary: Versioned catalog of source spans with a catalog digest binding all entries.

nodes.name: build_pass1_source_span_catalog
nodes.summary: Deterministically selects candidate spans (sentence ranges, word chunks) from authenticated source sections and builds the digest-bound span catalog.

nodes.name: project_pass1_source_ref_ids
nodes.summary: Projects the model's chosen span identities from a plan onto catalog entries, so source_refs bytes always come from the catalog rather than model output.

nodes.name: prework_artifact.py
nodes.summary: Versioned, digest-bound handoff artifact between workbook authoring and rendering: the WorkbookBriefPayloadV1 envelope plus writer/deep-dive execution receipts, runtime context, and exclusive atomic persistence helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Digest tolerance is handled via accepted-payload-digest variants so older payload framings (e.g., empty introduced_terms omitted) remain readable.

nodes.name: WriterExecutionReceipt
nodes.summary: Per-writer execution receipt (mode, calls, model, tokens, latency, cost) with a cost-posture validator requiring either cost or an unavailability reason.

nodes.name: DeepDiveExecutionReceiptV1
nodes.summary: Deep Dive execution receipt adding idempotency key, prior payload digest, slide-authority binding, and explicit fallback-engagement posture.

nodes.name: WorkbookBriefRuntimeContext
nodes.summary: Runtime context persisted next to the brief: run dir, course source root, encounter mode, writer execution mode, and writer seams' evidence.

nodes.name: WorkbookBriefPayloadV1
nodes.summary: The versioned workbook-brief payload reconciling pre-work, lesson type, promise authority refs, writer receipts, warnings, known losses, and the deep-dive skeleton.

nodes.name: WorkbookBriefArtifactV1
nodes.summary: Envelope binding a WorkbookBriefPayloadV1 to its canonical payload digest.

nodes.name: deep_dive_idempotency_key
nodes.summary: Derives the Deep Dive idempotency key from trial ID, authority digest, and model config digest.

nodes.name: workbook_brief_contribution_receipt
nodes.summary: Builds the contribution receipt for a workbook-brief artifact including accepted payload digests.

nodes.name: write_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Persists the workbook-brief artifact to the run directory via exclusive atomic text write.

nodes.name: read_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Reads and digest-validates a workbook-brief artifact from a run directory.

nodes.name: prework_from_run.py
nodes.summary: Explicit-root adapter that loads Part-2 scene source material (payoff slides, setup span, forbidden resolution spans) for the presentation-support pre-work authoring node.

nodes.name: Part2SceneSource
nodes.summary: Bundle of scene-authoring inputs loaded from disk: raw candidates, payoff slide inventory/keys, setup span, and forbidden resolution spans.

nodes.name: load_part2_scene_source
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the Part-2 scene source material from an explicit course source root for the pre-work authoring node.

nodes.name: prework_projection.py
nodes.summary: Strict, deterministic pre-work projection contracts for workbook producers: scene/friction/promise data contracts, honest offline seams, and pure Markdown projection, deliberately M3-safe with no runtime wiring.

nodes.name: SceneBrief
nodes.summary: Honest-availability scene contract carrying authored text, source refs, known losses, and lesson-type/archetype context.

nodes.name: PromiseProjection
nodes.summary: Honest-availability promise projection holding per-objective vows with known losses and a degradation marker.

nodes.name: PreWorkBrief
nodes.summary: Composite pre-work brief (scene, friction scale, promise, provenance, beat order) validating that provenance matches the nested contracts.

nodes.name: offline_scene_composer
nodes.summary: Offline scene-composer seam returning an honest unavailable SceneBrief without a model call.

nodes.name: render_prework_markdown
nodes.summary: Pure Markdown projection of a PreWorkBrief: scene, friction-scale frame, and promise vows in beat order.

nodes.name: promise_projection.py
nodes.summary: Strict ratified-objective resolution and pure Promise composition (Story 36.3): resolves LO authority from the run, transforms objectives into promise vows, and spoiler-gates against forbidden resolution spans.

nodes.name: PromiseObjectiveResolution
nodes.summary: Honest resolution of ratified learning objectives: status, objectives, authority variants/refs, known losses, and operator warnings.

nodes.name: resolve_promise_objectives
nodes.summary: Resolves ratified learning objectives from a run's authority files (via loader), classifying ineligible statuses and recording losses instead of guessing.

nodes.name: compose_promise_projection
nodes.summary: Pure Promise composition: transforms resolved objectives into vows via the transformer seam, gates for spoilers against forbidden resolution spans, and returns a gated result.

nodes.name: quiz_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects frozen G0 enrichment into QuizSpec inputs (Mine-next N3): prefers quiz-typed components with an assessment-like fallback, import-linter M3 safe.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_quiz_inputs
nodes.summary: Read-only projection from a frozen G0 enrichment card into QuizSpec items, preferring quiz-typed components and falling back to assessment-like types, with warnings for empty sources.

nodes.name: quiz_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders QuizSpec to Markdown (Mine-next N3), the quiz counterpart of the drill producer.

nodes.name: render_quiz_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a QuizSpec into the quiz Markdown artifact: title and LO-linked items with prompts, choices, expected answer focus, and source refs.

nodes.name: write_quiz_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered quiz Markdown to the output path, raising QuizProducerError on failure.

nodes.name: quiz_spec.py
nodes.summary: Quiz collateral content model (Mine-next N3): LO-linked short quiz items kept as a distinct artifact family from workbook and drill.

nodes.name: QuizItem
nodes.summary: A single LO-linked quiz item with prompt, choices, expected answer focus, and non-empty source references.

nodes.name: QuizSpec
nodes.summary: Top-level quiz artifact spec with closed kind, schema version, title, and items.

nodes.name: reflection_projection.py
nodes.summary: Pure Promise-bound closing-reflection projection (Story 37.4): binds the shifted question's ability cues back to prework friction callbacks, with a hardened gate, anti-forgery result replay, and defensive disposal of writer-returned awaitables.
nodes.languageNotes: Unusually deep hardening: CommonMark-surface rejection in vow text, Unicode tag-sequence structural validation, exact-model preflight of the owned Pydantic graph, and trusted-base asyncio task cancellation for rejected writer awaitables.

nodes.name: ReflectionWriterCandidate
nodes.summary: Honest writer candidate carrying ability focuses (name/see/do capability lenses), known losses, and a degradation marker.

nodes.name: ShiftedQuestionPrompt
nodes.summary: The composed shifted-question prompt: per-ability cues plus the fixed callback/capability/move clauses, requiring at least one cue.

nodes.name: ReflectionGateReceipt
nodes.summary: Gate receipt reconciling authority/prework/candidate digests, pre-gate disposition, declared vs bound ability refs, and failures.

nodes.name: ReflectionResult
nodes.summary: Anti-forgery final reflection result that replays its gate over embedded authority and candidate snapshots on validation.

nodes.name: _gate
nodes.summary: Core reflection gate: pre-gates promise/prework eligibility, validates the writer candidate contract, and binds ability cues to promise vows.

nodes.name: offline_closing_reflection_writer
nodes.summary: Offline writer seam returning an honest unavailable reflection candidate.

nodes.name: compose_closing_reflection
nodes.summary: Pure composition entry point: validates authority, invokes the writer (rejecting and safely disposing coroutine/task returns), gates the candidate, and assembles the digest-bound ReflectionResult.

nodes.name: research_demand.py
nodes.summary: Projects the 07W.1 Deep Dive skeleton into a strict, digest-bound Ask-A research demand, reconciling any prior execution receipt against the demand shape so downstream research dispatch only fires on an authorized, unchanged skeleton.
nodes.languageNotes: Closed-shape Pydantic v2 models with model_validator hooks; every demand is bound to a canonical payload digest.

nodes.name: AskAResearchDemandV1
nodes.summary: Closed-shape Pydantic model describing the Ask-A research demand derived from the Deep Dive skeleton, including status, losses, and the payload digest that pins the demand to its source skeleton.

nodes.name: _reconcile_execution
nodes.summary: Reconciles a persisted Ask-A execution receipt against the current skeleton and trial identity, deciding whether prior research output is still valid or the demand must be re-issued.

nodes.name: resolve_enrichment_demand
nodes.summary: Top-level resolver that reads run-dir prework artifacts, derives the Ask-A demand from the Deep Dive skeleton, and returns a ready/non-ready demand with explicit loss reasons.

nodes.name: research_packet.py
nodes.summary: W1 coordinate-selected shared research packet reader: an M3-safe facade that lets workbook, glossary, trends, and SPOC consumers read the exact requested research contribution from run.json with one shared validation and digest path.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately avoids importing app.marcus.orchestrator so consumers stay on the lesson-plan disk seam.

nodes.name: ResearchPacket
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass carrying a loaded research packet: status, specialist/node identity, entries, packet digest, and known losses, with a usable() predicate for consumers.

nodes.name: load_research_packet
nodes.summary: Loads and shape-validates the requested research contribution from run.json, computing a stable packet digest so every consumer of the same packet identity witnesses identical content.

nodes.name: resolve_for_consumer
nodes.summary: Generic consumer resolver that loads the research packet for a named consumer id and optionally enforces usability, funneling all named resolvers through one path.

nodes.name: resolve_for_glossary_writer
nodes.summary: Named resolver returning the research packet for the glossary writer consumer.

nodes.name: resolve_for_trends_projector
nodes.summary: Named resolver returning the research packet for the trends projection consumer.

nodes.name: resolve_for_enrichment_pool
nodes.summary: Named resolver returning the Ask-A enrichment contribution packet for the workbook enrichment pool.

nodes.name: resolve_for_hot_topics
nodes.summary: Named resolver returning the Ask-B hot-topics contribution packet for hot-topic consumers.

nodes.name: review_projection.py
nodes.summary: Strict, deterministic Review-frame contracts for workbook producers: accepts typed prework authority and projects an honest five-beat review shell (bookend, deep dive, check-on-learning, door-left-ajar, closing reflection) without reading runtime state or invoking semantic writers.
nodes.languageNotes: Writer seams are typed Protocols (DeepDiveWriter, CheckWriter, ReflectionWriter) with offline degradation defaults.

nodes.name: BookendBeat
nodes.summary: Strict model for the opening/closing bookend beat of the review frame, with an honesty validator ensuring the declared status matches its content.

nodes.name: ReviewBrief
nodes.summary: Composite model aggregating the five review beats into the complete review brief consumed by the workbook renderer.

nodes.name: ReviewWriterResult
nodes.summary: Result model for review-frame writers requiring an explicit loss reason whenever a writer degrades instead of authoring content.

nodes.name: build_review_brief
nodes.summary: Builds the five-beat ReviewBrief from typed prework authority, filling each beat honestly from available prework content.

nodes.name: render_review_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a ReviewBrief into the workbook's review-section markdown, one block per beat.

nodes.name: scene_extraction.py
nodes.summary: Traceable scene extraction for the workbook: normalizes scene candidates from source inventory, selects a seed, enforces token-level faithfulness gates against the seed text, and composes the scene projection through a closed composer seam with degraded fallbacks.

nodes.name: SceneSeed
nodes.summary: Strict model for the selected scene seed with a validator ensuring the scenario flag matches the source kind it was extracted from.

nodes.name: SceneProjectionRequest
nodes.summary: Request model for scene projection built from raw inventory candidates, enforcing unique inventory coordinates and lesson-type scope.

nodes.name: SceneProjectionResult
nodes.summary: Result model carrying the composed scene text, gate receipt, normalization receipt, and degradation status.

nodes.name: normalize_scene_candidates
nodes.summary: Normalizes raw scene candidate mappings into validated candidate entries, recording what was dropped and why in a normalization receipt.

nodes.name: select_scene_seed
nodes.summary: Deterministically selects the scene seed from the projection request's normalized candidates.

nodes.name: scene_faithfulness_prompt_constraints
nodes.summary: Derives prompt-level faithfulness constraints (allowed tokens and framing limits) from the seed text for the live scene composer.

nodes.name: compose_scene_projection
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full scene projection: scope check, seed selection, composer invocation through the closed seam, token-level faithfulness gating, setup-innocence review, and honest degraded fallback on any failure.

nodes.name: slide_authority.py
nodes.summary: Builds the exact clustered final-slide to authored source-slide authority map: refuses ordinal/title/fuzzy joins and resolves each final slide through the package-builder unit reference and literal source anchors, persisting the map with fsync-safe atomic writes and digest validation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses containment-checked file reads (read_contained_regular_bytes) and directory fsync for crash-safe persistence; every identity is sha256-digested.

nodes.name: read_contained_regular_bytes
nodes.summary: Reads bytes from a path only after verifying it is a regular file strictly contained within the given root, guarding against symlink and traversal escapes.

nodes.name: SourceSlideInventoryEntryV1
nodes.summary: Closed-shape model for one authored source-slide inventory entry with its content identity digest.

nodes.name: WorkbookSlideAuthorityRowV1
nodes.summary: Closed-shape model for one authority row mapping a final deck slide to its authored source slide identity via unit reference and literal anchors.

nodes.name: WorkbookSlideAuthorityMapV1
nodes.summary: Closed-shape model for the complete slide authority map, including upstream contribution digests, exclusion records, and cross-row uniqueness validation.

nodes.name: slide_authority_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical sha256 digest of a slide authority map, optionally excluding the map digest field itself for self-referential validation.

nodes.name: read_slide_authority_map
nodes.summary: Reads and validates the persisted slide authority map from the run directory, verifying its recorded digest against recomputed content.

nodes.name: write_or_validate_slide_authority_map
nodes.summary: Idempotently persists the slide authority map: writes atomically with directory fsync on first call, or validates an existing map matches the expected content byte-for-byte on replay.

nodes.name: resolve_exact_anchor_source
nodes.summary: Resolves a plan unit's literal source anchors to exactly one authored source slide, refusing any resolution that is ambiguous or requires fuzzy matching.

nodes.name: authenticated_anchor_source_texts
nodes.summary: Extracts anchor-resolvable source texts from Pass-1 authenticated source sections for use in anchor resolution.

nodes.name: build_slide_authority_map
nodes.summary: Builds the complete slide authority map from manifest segments, plan units, package slides, and the source inventory, joining strictly through unit references and exact anchors while recording explicit exclusions and identity digests.

nodes.name: workbook_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: P5-S1 consumption layer that projects the frozen operator-confirmed G0 enrichment card (typed components, citation resolutions, pedagogy annotations) into workbook producer inputs, so further-reading links and exercise Bloom levels are genuinely shaped by the enriched corpus.
nodes.languageNotes: Encodes the Texas render gate as a most-restrictive-wins AND-conjunction: teachable AND resolved AND truthy access_url.

nodes.name: WorkbookEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Typed container for the projected workbook inputs derived from the G0 enrichment card: further-reading entries, exercise briefs, and LO Bloom levels.

nodes.name: load_enrichment_card
nodes.summary: Loads the frozen G0EnrichmentResult card payload from the run directory for projection into workbook inputs.

nodes.name: citation_renders_authoritative
nodes.summary: Implements the render gate: a citation renders an authoritative link only if the component is teachable, the citation resolved, and the resolved access_url is truthy.

nodes.name: _project_further_reading
nodes.summary: Projects P2 citation resolutions into further-reading entries, applying the authoritative-render gate per citation and recording degraded (non-linked) entries honestly.

nodes.name: _project_exercises
nodes.summary: Projects typed components and their P3 pedagogy annotations into exercise briefs whose difficulty is driven by the annotated Bloom level.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_workbook_inputs
nodes.summary: Main projection entry point turning the G0 enrichment card into a WorkbookEnrichmentProjection: further reading from citation access_urls and exercises/LO levels from pedagogy Bloom annotations.

nodes.name: load_run_envelope
nodes.summary: Loads and shape-checks the run envelope (run.json), raising RunEnvelopeCorruptError with explicit diagnostics rather than returning partial data.

nodes.name: corpus_native_further_reading
nodes.summary: Derives further-reading entries directly from the corpus source files on disk (headings and reference slugs) as a corpus-native complement to citation-derived links.

nodes.name: ask_a_research_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Exactly-once Ask-A research dispatch at pipeline node 07W.2 with crash-safe journal replay: builds the retrieval intent from the demand scope, dispatches live research, normalizes and credibility-classifies provider rows, and persists a completed contribution atomically.
nodes.languageNotes: Journal-based exactly-once pattern: an idempotency key derived from trial id + scope digest gates replay vs fresh dispatch.

nodes.name: _build_intent
nodes.summary: Builds the retrieval intent (query, scope tokens, provider hints) from the Ask-A retrieval scope for the live research dispatch.

nodes.name: _normalize_results
nodes.summary: Normalizes heterogeneous dispatch results into a uniform row list, tolerating multiple provider result shapes while rejecting malformed rows.

nodes.name: _build_completed
nodes.summary: Assembles the completed Ask-A contribution: converts raw provider rows into knowledge entries with evidence-hierarchy classification and provenance, plus an execution receipt capturing provider iterations and outcomes.

nodes.name: _replay_completed
nodes.summary: Replays a previously journaled completed contribution after validating its idempotency key matches the current trial and scope, enabling crash-safe exactly-once semantics.

nodes.name: run_ask_a_research
nodes.summary: Node entry point for 07W.2: resolves the enrichment demand, checks credentials, replays the journal if present, otherwise dispatches live research and atomically journals the completed contribution.

nodes.name: package_builders.py
nodes.summary: S3 pre-dispatch package builders: pure, deterministic (no-LLM) transforms that turn upstream envelope contributions — ratified lesson plan plus creative directive — into the exact slide-brief payload vocabulary Gary consumes, invoked at manifest node 06 by the walkers.
nodes.languageNotes: Enforces the pipeline-manifest regime rule that no LLM runs in the deterministic neck; output keys must be a subset of Gary's consumed-payload contract.

nodes.name: BuilderInputError
nodes.summary: Structured error for invalid builder inputs carrying the offending node id and a diagnostic tag so envelope-level failures are attributable.

nodes.name: build_gary_briefs
nodes.summary: Deterministically derives per-slide Gary briefs from the ratified lesson plan, creative directive, and enrichment hints, producing the payload keyed to the manifest node 06 vocabulary.

nodes.name: run_builder_node
nodes.summary: Public entry point that acquires the Pass-1 generation lock and delegates to the locked builder body so package building and Pass-1 publication cannot interleave.

nodes.name: _run_builder_node_locked
nodes.summary: Locked builder body: reads upstream contributions from the production envelope, validates plan authority, builds the Gary brief package, and lands it as a first-class envelope contribution at its manifest node.

nodes.name: research_citation.py
nodes.summary: Braid S3 citation half of the research wiring: mints cited research entries from accepted Texas rows with deterministic source refs and content hashes, runs the G2 citation-fidelity gate in FAIL mode (any unsourced citation is RED), and wraps the read-only L2 research_supplements audit channel.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately keeps the FAIL-mode citation gate distinct from the warn-only numeric drift audit — they must never be conflated.

nodes.name: CitedResearchEntry
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a minted cited research entry with closed credibility-tier set validation and non-empty provenance requirements.

nodes.name: mint_cited_entry
nodes.summary: Mints a CitedResearchEntry from an accepted Texas row, deriving the deterministic source_ref from (provider, source_id) and a stable content hash over the row identity and body.

nodes.name: apply_triangulation_to_entries
nodes.summary: Applies cross-source triangulation to minted entries, upgrading confidence where multiple independent sources corroborate the same claim.

nodes.name: count_unsourced_citations
nodes.summary: Counts workbook/run citations whose source_ref does not resolve to any retrieved Texas row or corpus source — the raw signal for the G2 gate.

nodes.name: gate_citation_fidelity
nodes.summary: Runs the G2 citation-fidelity gate in FAIL mode: raises CitationFidelityError if any citation is unsourced (unsourced_citations must equal zero).

nodes.name: audit_research_supplements
nodes.summary: Wraps the read-only L2 numeric provenance audit, passing retrieved research figures as research_supplements so legitimately sourced numbers classify as supplements rather than drift.

nodes.name: assemble_l2_citation_report
nodes.summary: Assembles the combined L2 citation report: gate verdict, citation manifest, duplicate detection, and the supplements-aware numeric audit into one reviewable artifact.

nodes.name: dedupe_cited_entries
nodes.summary: Deduplicates minted cited entries by source identity, keeping the first occurrence and reporting the duplicates removed.

nodes.name: research_credibility.py
nodes.summary: Evidence-hierarchy credibility classification (Agentic Research Foundations R4): maps Texas retrieval rows onto the closed T1-T7 tier set from the research-evidence-hierarchy guide using heuristic metadata only.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicitly heuristic metadata classification — not a clinical grade of evidence.

nodes.name: classify_evidence_hierarchy
nodes.summary: Classifies a Texas row into one evidence-hierarchy tier (systematic review, peer RCT, observational, preprint, grey literature, etc.) from its provider metadata.

nodes.name: workbook_prework_writers.py
nodes.summary: Named live structured-output LLM adapters for the 07W.1 semantic writers: a shared retrying structured-writer base plus LiveSceneComposer, LivePromiseTransformer, and LiveDeepDiveWriter, each with typed degradation paths when the provider output fails its gates.
nodes.languageNotes: Generic _StructuredWriter[T] base handles invoke/retry/metadata recording; LiveDeepDiveWriter degrades to a safe deterministic construction on bold-parity failure.

nodes.name: _StructuredWriter
